docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF KEVIN MURPHY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVON SAHALEH IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF ORALLY STIPULATES TO ALLOW JUDGE PRO TEM HEAR THIS CASE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,873.33 FILED BY MURPHY, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT SAHALEH, EVON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,227.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SAHALEH, EVON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED MAY-08-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAHALEH, EVON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURPHY, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAHALEH, EVON $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT SAHALEH, EVON
